diff:
diff --git a/src/network.py b/src/network.py
index 7540f16..ccddbc5 100644
--- a/src/network.py
+++ b/src/network.py
@@ -1,4 +1,18 @@
+
+
 def parse_host_port(value: str, default_port: int = 80) -> tuple[str, int]:
+    # Handle IPv6 addresses enclosed in brackets
+    if value.startswith("["):
+        closing = value.find("]")
+        if closing != -1:
+            host = value[1:closing]  # strip brackets
+            # Check if port follows
+            if len(value) > closing+1 and value[closing+1] == ":":
+                port_text = value[closing+2:]
+                if port_text:
+                    return host, int(port_text)
+            return host, default_port
+    # Fallback to simple host:port parsing for hosts without brackets
     host, sep, port_text = value.partition(":")
     if not sep:
         return value, default_port
